lines.speaker: Smoggy
lines.text: Are you here to make juniper charcoal?

lines.speaker: Smoggy
lines.text: They use it in the blast mine, out near Lovakengj. It's powerful stuff, more volatile than the regular charcoal you get elsewhere.

lines.speaker: Smoggy
lines.text: To make juniper charcoal, put some juniper logs in my furnaces, then set them alight. I'll keep an eye on it for a fee of 600 coins.

lines.speaker: Smoggy
lines.text: Juniper charcoal is my trade, always has been, ever since my mum taught me. She's retired now, and returned to Lovakengj - that's where we're from.

lines.speaker: Smoggy
lines.text: I just live out here in the Hosidius farmlands because it's handy for the juniper trees.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you do for me?

lines.speaker: Smoggy
lines.text: For a small fee, I watch the charcoal furnace so that you can make charcoal here. Also, I do a great back- rub, if you're ever in the mood.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you got a spare tinderbox?

lines.speaker: Smoggy
lines.text: Yup, but I'll keep it for someone who needs it.

lines.speaker: Smoggy
lines.text: Yup, but you can't hold it.
